title: remember skill INDEX no FTS global
purpose: E3.3 defines remember skill index no fts global for the agent-driven expert system. Knowledge & composition — catalog, compose-first, staleness.
scope: Owns `E3.3` only; siblings under `E3` must not duplicate this spec.
Aligns with minimal HITL: H1 plan, H2 blocker, H3 sign-off ([INTRO-1.2](INTRO-1.2-human-touchpoint-contract-h1-h2-h3.md)).
Conflicts resolve in favor of [Vision §7 — Branch E — Knowledge & composition plane](../../full-automation-vision-and-hierarchy.md#7-branch-e-knowledge-composition-plane).
behavior_steps: When `evidence_required` is true in state.json per [G1.2](G1.2-evidence-required-state.md), the conductor runs [G1.1](G1.1-task-verify-router-verifier.md) verify-router for each implement task and blocks advancing `next_action` until `last_verify=passed` and evidence paths exist on disk.
Workers may not mark TODOS or task cards complete in prose—the conductor dual-writes completion only after verify-router exit 0 and evidence files are recorded in journal and state.

S0 `validate-workflow.py` checks `last_verify` and `evidence_files` on every wake; mismatch between claimed done and machine state triggers an integrity stop per [A4.4](A4.4-stop-integrity-validate-workflow-state-corrupt.md).
Audit and hierarchy quality scripts re-enqueue deepen when queue items close without artifacts, preventing silent hallucinated done from persisting across passes.
If pursuit would advance without demonstrated evidence, the conductor fails closed at H2 rather than assuming success—Plane G treats demonstrated verify as the only valid completion signal.

Edge case `E3.3` variant 4: verify state dual-write before continuing pursuit.

**False complete:** Item marked done without artifact â†’ audit-hierarchy-depth.py re-enqueues deepen pass.
**Scope bleed:** Worker edits journal/state during planning-only expansion â†’ forbidden in vision-expansion-prompt.
**Stale design:** Upstream vision Â§ changes â†’ reconcile-stale adds deepen items for affected ids.

narrative: E3.3 defines remember skill index no fts global for the agent-driven expert system. Knowledge & composition — catalog, compose-first, staleness. In practice, the system when `evidence_required` is true in state.json per [g1.2](g1.2-evidence-required-state.md), the conductor runs [g1.1](g1.1-task-verify-router-verifier.md) verify-router for each implement task and blocks advancing `next_action` until `last_verify=passed` and evidence paths exist on disk, then workers may not mark todos or task cards complete in prose—the conductor dual-writes completion only after verify-router exit 0 and evidence files are recorded in journal and state.
reader_narrative:
<!-- prose-source: agent plane-e 2026-06-28 -->

The remember skill captures operator snippets into `docs/facts/captured.md` and updates facts INDEX—explicit "remember this" workflow, not ambient chat memory. There is no global FTS or hidden vector store; all retained knowledge is file-backed and discoverable via [E1.4](E1.4-catalog-facts-index.md).

This keeps Plane E honest: if it is not in facts/decisions/catalog, agents should not treat it as project truth. Remember complements journal Resolved Q&A for durable non-decision snippets (Slack URLs, SQL fragments). Promotion candidates from repeated captures may enqueue via [E2.5](E2.5-compose-miss-l0-enqueue-promotion.md).
